author: orionriver@gmail.com
text:
Freeze greenfield architecture spec to docs/architecture.md

Extract the finalized §0-§17 greenfield design out of working ball bl-2e26's description into docs/architecture.md as a frozen reference, with a status banner recording provenance and the change discipline. This should have preceded implementation; doing it now so the build (epic bl-72a8) targets a stable path rather than a churning ball.
